For questions about the updated 2021 STI Treatment Guidelines, you can email the Clinical Team in CDC’s Division of STD Prevention at stitxguidelines@cdc.gov . You can also contact (contact name) at (contact number/email) .
Thank you for your commitment to improving the sexual health and wellness of people in (organization’s state/county/city) .
Sincerely,
(print name)
